text:
tion. There are two kinds of globalization in the modern world. One is based on the US as the driving force of globalization, form-
                                                                                                                    ing the consumption engine for global economic development. The
                                                                                                                    other is the globalization driven by China’s urbanization, namely,
                                                                                                                    China’s urban infrastructure construction and industrialization are
                                                                                                                    the engines of this kind of globalization. Development-oriented
                                                                                                                    finance is based on global strategic thoughts. On the one hand, it
                                                                                                                    attaches great importance to the US-led financial consumption
                                                                                                                    power, while avoiding the emergence of China’s “new fetishism of
                                                                                                                    commodities” and abuse of consumer credit. On the other hand, it
                                                                                                                    firmly grasps the huge market and opportunities brought by urban-
                                                                                                                    ization. In economic globalization, China’s urbanization is the
                                                                                                                    world’s largest modern movement and the enormous demand that
                                                                                                                    comes along with urbanization provides new opportunities and
                                                                                                                    incentives for improving the modern credit structure. Development-
                                                                                                                    oriented finance adheres to “credit will be around the whole
                                                                                                                    world”.
